title: activity — Eloquent observers
description: Observation of arbitrary opted-in models is delegated to spatie's built-in LogsActivity behaviour — no explicit observer class needed. The single owned observer is on the Activity model itself to fire ActivityRecorded.

handles: creating → resolve tenant_id from TenancyResolver if not set + populate ULID prefix `act_`
creating → resolve retention_tier from #[LoggableActivity] on subject_type OR default from tenant plan
created → fire ActivityRecorded (afterCommit) so downstream feeds (in-app fan-out) receive it
